title: Lenovo India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Lenovo India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
